item.title: 4.11]宿舍、辦公室隨時開火！超簡單的一鍋到底快煮鍋食譜

item.itunes:summary:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ye2TfVdCJwk 宿舍、辦公室放個快煮鍋？該煮什麼呢？來點簡單快捷食譜吧！
本影片沒有給任何廠商過稿，但以下是本人有獲益的團購
旅行神器🌍✈️ KINYO 雙電壓旅行3in1小圓鍋 (4/11-4/17) https://gbf.tw/ogonj
註:那隻企鵝/貓頭鷹是藏鏡人畫的，大名Pengowl貓頭鵝，Line上已有貼圖
近期團購統整: https://portaly.cc/DrAchi Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HiThisIsAchi Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hithisisachi LBRY: https://odysee.com/$/invite/@HiThisIsAchi:7
For commercial collaboration / 廠商合作與試用請洽： dr.achi.studio@gmail.com

item.title: 3.31]產後哺乳超崩潰！？各種奇葩乳牛道具哪些有用？
item.itunes:title: 3.31]產後哺乳超崩潰！？各種奇葩乳牛道具哪些有用？
item.itunes:author: 阿淇博士 Dr. Achi
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PFCOBWv9G-g 哺乳難為，乳牛難當。但挑對東西可以當頭快樂的牛啊，哞～ 無廣告的各種我覺得好用的東西： modela 羊毛脂乳頭霜 https://amzn.to/41H1HqU SILVERETTE 鋼鐵奶盾 https://amzn.to/4hoV1n6 haakaa 瓢蟲集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iFTsCk haakaa 長型集乳器 https://amzn.to/4id2gQm Spectra Baby S1電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4hnXGxi Momcozy 大胸網狀集乳內衣 https://amzn.to/3DwN6q0 媽媽餵哺乳內衣 https://www.mamaway.com.tw/product-detail/M310210826G2XL/ smallshow 哺乳T https://amzn.to/4ikymtq momcozy 電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iBM2zX bluesnail 防水墊 https://amzn.to/4kHKdmX Bumco Baby 屁屁膏用抹刀https://www.amazon.com/dp/B079G5FWXL/ref=cm_sw_r_as_gl_api_gl_i_BQTG8360GQ32Q3MDNCSY?linkCode=ml2\u0026tag=achistudio-20 註:那隻企鵝/貓頭鷹是藏鏡人畫的，大名Pengowl貓頭鵝，Line上已有貼圖 近期團購統整: https://portaly.cc/DrAchi Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HiThisIsAchi Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hithisisachi LBRY: https://odysee.com/$/invite/@HiThisIsAchi:7 For commercial collaboration / 廠商合作與試用請洽： dr.achi.studio@gmail.com
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PFCOBWv9G-g 哺乳難為，乳牛難當。但挑對東西可以當頭快樂的牛啊，哞～ 無廣告的各種我覺得好用的東西： modela 羊毛脂乳頭霜 https://amzn.to/41H1HqU SILVERETTE 鋼鐵奶盾 https://amzn.to/4hoV1n6 haakaa 瓢蟲集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iFTsCk haakaa 長型集乳器 https://amzn.to/4id2gQm Spectra Baby S1電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4hnXGxi Momcozy 大胸網狀集乳內衣 https://amzn.to/3DwN6q0 媽媽餵哺乳內衣 https://www.mamaway.com.tw/product-detail/M310210826G2XL/ smallshow 哺乳T https://amzn.to/4ikymtq momcozy 電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iBM2zX bluesnail 防水墊 https://amzn.to/4kHKdmX Bumco Baby 屁屁膏用抹刀https://www.amazon.com/dp/B079G5FWXL/ref=cm_sw_r_as_gl_api_gl_i_BQTG8360GQ32Q3MDNCSY?linkCode=ml2\u0026tag=achistudio-20 註:那隻企鵝/貓頭鷹是藏鏡人畫的，大名Pengowl貓頭鵝，Line上已有貼圖 近期團購統整: https://portaly.cc/DrAchi Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HiThisIsAchi Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hithisisachi LBRY: https://odysee.com/$/invite/@HiThisIsAchi:7 For commercial collaboration / 廠商合作與試用請洽： dr.achi.studio@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PFCOBWv9G-g
哺乳難為，乳牛難當。但挑對東西可以當頭快樂的牛啊，哞～

無廣告的各種我覺得好用的東西：

modela 羊毛脂乳頭霜  https://amzn.to/41H1HqU
SILVERETTE 鋼鐵奶盾 https://amzn.to/4hoV1n6

haakaa 瓢蟲集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iFTsCk
haakaa 長型集乳器  https://amzn.to/4id2gQm

Spectra Baby S1電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4hnXGxi

Momcozy 大胸網狀集乳內衣 https://amzn.to/3DwN6q0

媽媽餵哺乳內衣 https://www.mamaway.com.tw/product-detail/M310210826G2XL/

smallshow 哺乳T https://amzn.to/4ikymtq

momcozy 電動集乳器 https://amzn.to/4iBM2zX

bluesnail 防水墊 https://amzn.to/4kHKdmX

Bumco Baby 屁屁膏用抹刀https://www.amazon.com/dp/B079G5FWXL/ref=cm_sw_r_as_gl_api_gl_i_BQTG8360GQ32Q3MDNCSY?linkCode=ml2\u0026tag=achistudio-20


註:那隻企鵝/貓頭鷹是藏鏡人畫的，大名Pengowl貓頭鵝，Line上已有貼圖

近期團購統整: https://portaly.cc/DrAchi
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HiThisIsAchi
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hithisisachi
LBRY: https://odysee.com/$/invite/@HiThisIsAchi:7

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VNH_t5843hc 歐美男性跑到亞洲買女友！？他們對台灣女生是怎麼看的呢？ 本影片沒有給任何廠商過稿，但以下是本人有獲益的團購： OXO 小物團購 👉 https://gbf.tw/agm7r 本影片只是精華，完整版請看各大Podcast平台： Spotify https://open.spotify.com/show/4Zw8SmrCbflhrUFwr4jOGa Apple https://podcasts.apple.com/podcast/1710395529 KKBox https://podcast.kkbox.com/tw/channel/DZyO2U-wb9IAf3fpMy Mymusic https://www.mymusic.net.tw/podcast/rsschannel/45458 Podtail https://podmailer.com/podcast/--chipodrant 註:那隻企鵝/貓頭鷹是藏鏡人畫的，大名Pengowl貓頭鵝，Line上已有貼圖 近期團購統整: https://portaly.cc/DrAchi Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HiThisIsAchi Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hithisisachi LBRY: https://odysee.com/$/invite/@HiThisIsAchi:7 For commercial collaboration / 廠商合作與試用請洽： dr.achi.studio@gmail.com

item.title: 3.13]產後首度回台灣！星宇商務艙的狼狽體驗！13小時帶娃坐飛機全記錄
